<!--
  Thanks for the contribution! A few notes before submitting:

  - OmniDiff is a personal portfolio project. PRs are reviewed when the
    author has time — response can take days. No hard SLA.
  - All commits in this PR must be GPG- or SSH-signed (CI enforces).
  - The branch must pass CI (Python lint/tests, Rust fmt/clippy/test,
    gitleaks). Failing CI = no merge.
  - For larger changes, open an Issue first to align on the approach.
    Surprise PRs that change architecture rarely get merged.
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1-3 bullets on what changes and why -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (please link to the issue we aligned on)
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI / chore

## How was this tested?

<!-- Commands run, manual steps, screenshots if UI -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pytest` / `cargo test` as applicable)
- [ ] Linters pass (`ruff` / `cargo clippy -- -D warnings`)
- [ ] Commits are signed
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or `.env` files in the diff
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior changed
